name: restream
description: A streaming server which takes inputs and replicates them to multiple outputs.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ts,css -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run watch:frontend" "npm run watch:css"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/output.css
scripts.test: npm run test:routes && npm run test:normalization
scripts.test:input: ffmpeg -re -stream_loop -1 -i media/colorbar-timer.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -b:v 2500k -bf 0 -g 50 -pix_fmt yuv420p -tune zerolatency -c:a aac -b:a 128k -ac 2 -f flv rtmp://localhost:1935/mystream
scripts.test:input:rtmp: ffmpeg -re -stream_loop -1 -i media/colorbar-timer.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -b:v 2500k -bf 0 -g 50 -pix_fmt yuv420p -tune zerolatency -c:a aac -b:a 128k -ac 2 -f flv rtmp://localhost:1935/live/key01_6c71124cde80358ca7c13081
scripts.test:input:srt: ffmpeg -re -stream_loop -1 -i media/colorbar-timer.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -b:v 2500k -bf 0 -g 50 -pix_fmt yuv420p -tune zerolatency -c:a aac -b:a 128k -ac 2 -f mpegts srt://localhost:10080?streamid=publish:live/key02_fff2adcf55a26d31ae93464b
scripts.audit: npm audit || true && npm outdated || true
